title: MBBS Jobs 2026 – Bank Medical Consultant
shortInfo: Reserve Bank of India (RBI) Bank's Medical Consultant (BMC) Recruitment 2026 notification is out for 1 contractual vacancy. Candidates with an MBBS degree and minimum 2 years of experience as a Registered Medical Practitioner can apply offline through the official website before 24 June 2026.

basic_details.job_title: RBI Bank Medical Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Reserve Bank of India (RBI) Bank's Medical Consultant (BMC) Recruitment 2026 notification is out for 1 contractual vacancy. Candidates with an MBBS degree and minimum 2 years of experience as a Registered Medical Practitioner can apply offline through the official website before 24 June 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS degree in the allopathic system of medicine, Postgraduate degree in General Medicine
qualification.details: MBBS degree in the allopathic system of medicine of any University recognized by the Medical Council of India. Postgraduate degree in General Medicine from any University recognized by the Medical Council of India may also apply. Minimum of two (02) years of experience practicing allopathic system of medicine in any hospital or clinic as Registered Medical Practitioner. Own dispensary or place of residence within a radius of 30 Kms from the Bank's dispensary.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://www.rbi.org.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 24-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the RBI Bank's Medical Consultant (BMC) post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the RBI Bank's Medical Consultant (BMC) post is 24th June 2026.

faq.question: What is the educational qualification required for the BMC post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS degree in the allopathic system of medicine. A postgraduate degree in General Medicine is optional. A minimum of two years of experience as a Registered Medical Practitioner is also required.

faq.question: What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their application form to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: How many vacancies are available for the Bank's Medical Consultant (BMC) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Bank's Medical Consultant (BMC) post.

faq.question: What is the salary offered for the BMC position?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Bank's Medical Consultant (BMC) position is ₹1,000/- per hour.

faq.question: Is there any application fee for the RBI BMC recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for General/OBC and SC/ST categories for this recruitment.

faq.question: What is the selection process for the BMC role?
faq.answer: The selection process includes an Interview, Document Verification, and Medical Examination.

faq.question: Where is the job location for this RBI recruitment?
faq.answer: The job location is Chandigarh, with the pincode 160017.

faq.question: Does the candidate need to have their own dispensary?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates must have their own dispensary or place of residence within a radius of 30 Kms from the Bank's dispensary.

faq.question: Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the RBI's official website, and links are provided in the "Important Links" section of this article.

seo_tags: Reserve Bank of India Bank's Medical Consultant (BMC) Recruitment 2026
